query:
INSERT INTO qumus_core_policies (name, description, category, rules, priority, is_active) VALUES
('Content Recommendation Engine', 'AI-driven content recommendations based on user listening history, preferences, and time of day', 'recommendation', '{"autonomy_level": 95, "confidence_threshold": 80, "triggers": ["user_login", "track_end", "browse"], "actions": ["suggest_tracks", "auto_queue", "personalize_feed"]}', 10, 1),
('Payment Processing', 'Autonomous payment handling for donations, subscriptions, and merchandise with fraud detection', 'payment', '{"autonomy_level": 85, "confidence_threshold": 95, "triggers": ["checkout", "subscription_renewal", "donation"], "actions": ["process_payment", "verify_fraud", "send_receipt"], "human_review_above": 500}', 9, 1),
('Content Moderation', 'AI moderation of user-generated content, comments, and uploads with escalation for edge cases', 'moderation', '{"autonomy_level": 90, "confidence_threshold": 85, "triggers": ["content_upload", "comment_post", "report"], "actions": ["approve", "flag", "remove", "escalate"]}', 8, 1),
('User Registration & Onboarding', 'Automated user registration, verification, and personalized onboarding flow', 'registration', '{"autonomy_level": 98, "confidence_threshold": 75, "triggers": ["signup", "oauth_callback"], "actions": ["create_account", "send_welcome", "setup_preferences"]}', 7, 1),
('Subscription Management', 'Handle subscription lifecycle - upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, and renewals', 'subscription', '{"autonomy_level": 92, "confidence_threshold": 88, "triggers": ["subscription_change", "renewal_due", "payment_failed"], "actions": ["process_change", "retry_payment", "send_notification"]}', 8, 1),
('Performance Alert System', 'Monitor system performance, broadcast quality, and trigger alerts for degradation', 'performance', '{"autonomy_level": 95, "confidence_threshold": 70, "triggers": ["latency_spike", "error_rate_high", "stream_quality_drop"], "actions": ["alert_admin", "auto_scale", "switch_fallback"]}', 10, 1),
('Analytics Aggregation', 'Collect, aggregate, and report on listener analytics, engagement metrics, and content performance', 'analytics', '{"autonomy_level": 98, "confidence_threshold": 60, "triggers": ["hourly_cron", "daily_cron", "event_batch"], "actions": ["aggregate_metrics", "generate_report", "update_dashboard"]}', 6, 1),
('Compliance & Reporting', 'Ensure regulatory compliance, generate audit logs, and produce compliance reports', 'compliance', '{"autonomy_level": 75, "confidence_threshold": 95, "triggers": ["audit_request", "monthly_cron", "policy_change"], "actions": ["generate_audit_log", "compliance_check", "notify_admin"], "human_review_required": true}', 9, 1);
